'''hasogo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:pochoxime|pochoxime]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| h-s-g
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:pochoxime|pochoxime]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| hasogo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:hæsegeth|hæsegeth]] || [[word:hæsegej|hæsegej]] || [[word:hæsegesh|hæsegesh]] || [[word:hæsege|hæsege]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:hasosogoth|hasosogoth]] || [[word:hasosogoj|hasosogoj]] || [[word:hasosogosh|hasosogosh]] || [[word:hasosogo|hasosogo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:hasogoth|hasogoth]] || [[word:hasogoj|hasogoj]] || [[word:hasogosh|hasogosh]] || [[word:hasogo|hasogo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:hasofgoth|hasofgoth]] || [[word:hasofgoj|hasofgoj]] || [[word:hasofgosh|hasofgosh]] || [[word:hasofgof|hasofgof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:hasogotho|hasogotho]] || [[word:hasogojo|hasogojo]] || [[word:hasogosho|hasogosho]] || [[word:hasogoko|hasogoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:hasogoth|hasogoth]] || [[word:hasogoj|hasogoj]] || [[word:hasogosh|hasogosh]] || [[word:hasogo|hasogo]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:hasogothol|hasogothol]] || [[word:hasogojol|hasogojol]] || [[word:hasogoshol|hasogoshol]] || [[word:hasogokol|hasogokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:hasogothotho|hasogothotho]] || [[word:hasogojojo|hasogojojo]] || [[word:hasogoshosho|hasogoshosho]] || [[word:hasogoko|hasogoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:hasogothon|hasogothon]] || [[word:hasogojon|hasogojon]] || [[word:hasogoshon|hasogoshon]] || [[word:hasogokon|hasogokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:hasogothoro|hasogothoro]] || [[word:hasogojoro|hasogojoro]] || [[word:hasogoshoro|hasogoshoro]] || [[word:hasogokoro|hasogokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|dcef9d8}}
